headline: PCA CEO says $5.2B worth of investments will pay off in 2026
summary: Packaging Corporation of America CEO Mark Kowlzan detailed the impact of investments over the last decade, where energy projects are set to occur, and his optimism for nearshoring, during a BofA Securities event.
